04_GenotypeFigures

Sophie Buysse

2026-03-12

library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)

Read in data

Read in the data needed for all plotting.

# 2021
Dat<- read.csv("data/GenotypeMeans.csv")
# set factors
Dat <- Dat %>% dplyr::mutate(
  Treatment = as.factor(Treatment),
  Geno_ID = as.factor(Geno_ID),
  year = as.factor(year),
  trait = as.factor(trait)
)

Dat$Population <- "Sweden"
Dat[substr(Dat$Geno_ID, start = 1, stop = 1) == "B", "Population"] <- "Italy"

Set theme for plots

theme_set(theme_classic())
theme_update(legend.title = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "serif", color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = 'black', linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks.length=unit(.15, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.03, "cm"),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    #plot.margin = margin(t=1, r=0.075, b=0.075, l=0.05, unit = "in") # his was to  leave room for stats at the top of each figure
    )

# If I want to add back in that the y axis should always start at 0:
#  expand_limits(y=0)

# what font is serif?
windowsFonts()$serif
## [1] "TT Times New Roman"

2021 only plots

fruits <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "FruitNum", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Fruit Count", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
fruits

seeds <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "l10_seeds per fruit", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = response)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Seeds Per Fruit", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

seeds
## Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

fitness <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "TotalFitness", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Total Fitness", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

fitness

flowering <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "Emergence To Flowering", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Days To Flowering", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

flowering
## Warning: Removed 3 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 3 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

2022 only plots

stoden <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "l10_Stomata_density", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = response)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Stomatal Density", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

stoden
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

ag <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "l10_AG", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = response)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Above Ground Biomass", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

ag
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

bg <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "BG_DryBiomass", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Below Ground Biomass", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

bg
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

rs <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "l10_Root_to_Shoot", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = response)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Root-to-shoot", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

rs
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

totbio <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "TotalBiomass", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Geno_ID, col = Population), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5)+ 
  labs(y="Total Biomass", 
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))

totbio
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

traits with both

sla <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "l10_SLA", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = response)) +
  geom_point(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, col = Population, linetype = year), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  labs(y=expression(paste("Specific Leaf Area ", (cm^2 / g))),
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Experiment",
                        labels = c("2021", "2022"),
                        values = c("solid", "dotted"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))
sla
## Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

rwc <- ggplot(data = Dat[Dat$trait == "RWC", ], aes(x = Treatment, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, col=Population, shape = Population), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, ymin=lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, col = Population), width = 0.3, size = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE)+
  geom_line(aes(group = year:Geno_ID, col = Population, linetype = year), linewidth = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = TRUE)+
  labs(y=expression(paste("Relative Water Content")),
      x="Treatment")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Population",
                     labels = c("Italy", "Sweden"),
                     values = c("#CC79A7", "#009E73"))+
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Experiment",
                        labels = c("2021", "2022"),
                        values = c("solid", "dotted"))+
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0.6,0))
rwc
## Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).
## Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_line()`).

make big figure

fig1 <- ggarrange(rwc+rremove("xlab"), sla+rremove("xlab"), flowering, stoden, rs, totbio, ag, bg, fruits, seeds, fitness,#
                  labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G", "H", "I", "J", "K"),
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 6,
                  common.legend = TRUE, # created based on the first plot
                  legend = "none",
                  align = "hv"
)
